title: Nigeria@65: SEC DG calls for financial independence through capital market participation - FinancialEDGE
description: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has urged Nigerians to take advantage of opportunities in the capital market to build personal and national financial independence as the country marked its 65th Independence Anniversary. In a goodwill message titled “Forging a New Legacy of Financial Independence”, Agama described the
html: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has urged Nigerians to take advantage of opportunities in the capital market to build personal and national financial independence as the country marked its 65th Independence Anniversary.
